offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month, inefficient permit application submissions cause project delays. We convert project documents into standardized submissions instead of manual submission of permit applications.
problem: Inefficient permit application submissions lead to project delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try document conversion and submission reminders on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
